name: Tessa (Khan)
description:
Swap (10/11)

There is Khan and Nori (Khan swapped with Alice and Nori swapped with Tessa, dunno why) but I wanna get this and the RPG done and jump on BunixFurs' Drones of the Deep AU before anyone else does it. I like the take on the traditional Murder Drones timeline.

Lumineary_Arts made this picture and AU.
